description: Exercise Web HTTPS server with HTML

scripts.start: npm i & npm update & node src/js/server.mjs
scripts.bonus: npm i & npm update & node src/js/bonus.mjs
scripts.dev: npm i & npm update & node --watch src/js/server.mjs
scripts.bonus:dev: npm i & npm update & node --watch src/js/bonus.mjs
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n server,bonus -c blue,green "npm run start" "npm run bonus"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n server,bonus -c blue,green "npm run dev" "npm run bonus:dev"

author: Glodie Tshimini
